card.name: Acolyte of Loss
card.text: When Acolyte of Loss enters, each player sacrifices a creature other than Acolyte of Loss. Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Acolyte of Plurality
card.text: Flying Other creatures you control have +1/+0. Whenever Acolyte of Plurality attacks, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Acolyte of Self-Importance
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Acolyte of Self-Importance gains menace and indestructible until end of turn. Whenever Acolyte of Self-Importance deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Acolyte of the Depths
card.text: Whenever one or more of your creatures you control become tapped for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Acolyte of the Depths.

card.name: Acolyte of the Wilds
card.text: Acolyte of the Wilds cost {X} less to cast where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. Trample

card.name: True-hearted Minimalist
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Put two +1/+1 counters and a flying counter on True-hearted Minimalist. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Solun Tactician
card.text: Whenever Solun Tactician or another creature enters under your control, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Eager Cherub
card.text: Flying

card.name: Lonely Domestic
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice Lonely Domestic: Target creature gains indestructible and hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Preacher of Enlightenment
card.text: When Preacher of Enlightenment enters, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Medatative Two-Spirit
card.text: When Medatative Two-Spirit dies, Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Eager Enlistee
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice Eager Enlistee: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Holy City Sentinel
card.text: Flying When Holy City Sentinel enters, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Walls of the Empire
card.text: Defender Soldiers you control have +1/+0. Whenever you attack, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Consult the Enlightened
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Minimalist — If a nontoken permanent you control was put into a graveyard this turn, create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying instead.

card.name: Enlightened Bishop
card.text: Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Solun Avenger
card.text: Flying When Solun Avenger enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creature tokens.

card.name: War Room Talks
card.text: Draw a card. Conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. You Gain 2 life. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Solus' Rebuke
card.text: Solus' Rebuke rebuke deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Phraz's Inaction
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and can't attack or block.

card.name: Destroy Evil
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Path to Enlightenment
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has menace. When enchanted creature dies, if it isn't a token, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Return Path to Enlightenment to the battlefield attached to that token.

card.name: Prayer of Courage
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Meditation
card.text: Flash When Meditation enters, target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. {1}, Sacrifice Meditation: Gain 3 life.

card.name: Snow Owl
card.text: Flying Convicted —Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Snow Owl.

card.name: Merfolk Zealot
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Whenever you discard an instant or sorcery card for the first time each turn, untap Merfolk Zealot.

card.name: Efficient Acrobat
card.text: When Efficient Acrobat enters, surveil 2. Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Efficient Acrobat gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Lethargy Mage
card.text: Whenever Lethargy Mage is tapped, if it isn't combat, draw a card, then discard a card. {G}{U}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Fidist Rioter
card.text: Haste Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put two +1/+1 counters on Fidist Rioter.

card.name: Tome Bearer
card.text: When Tome Bearer enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Imprisoned Sage
card.text: Defender, menace (This creature can't attack. This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Imprisoned Sage loses defender until end of turn.

card.name: Tide Pool Temptress
card.text: Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.) Whenever Tide Pool Temptress attacks, tap target creature.

card.name: Scourge of the Seas
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Snow Fortifications
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) When Snow Fortifications enters, put a stun counter on target creature. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Fides' Rebuke
card.text: Counter target spell. Convicted — If Fides' Rebuke is the second spell you've cast this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Lost in the Current
card.text: Reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put a noncreature card revealed this way into your hand. Put the rest into you graveyard. Resurface 3 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 3 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Caught in the Rip Tide
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack. {1}: Tap enchanted creature.

card.name: Belief Makes Right
card.text: Draw four cards then discard two cards.

card.name: Visit the Ancient Sage
card.text: Convicted — Draw two cards. Discard a card unless this is the second spell you have cast this turn.

card.name: Cryogenic Impediment
card.text: Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. Convicted — If this is the second spell you have cast this turn, put three stun counters on it instead.

card.name: Sea's Memory
card.text: Distribute three +1/+1 counters among creatures you control. Resurface 5 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 5 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Crush Under Waves
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures and put a stun counter on each of them. Resurface 4 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 4 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ideological Epiphany
card.text: Convicted — If this is the second spell you have cast this turn, it costs {U}{U} less to cast. Draw X cards.

card.name: Starving Carcass
card.text: Deathtouch Scavenge {1}{BG} ({1}{BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Bone Picking Vulture
card.text: Flying When Bone Picking Vulture enters, mill four cards.

card.name: Priest of Destitution
card.text: When Priest of Destitution enters, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Stalking Snow Tiger
card.text: When Stalking Snow Tiger enters or is scavenged, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Scavenge {4}{B}{B} ({4}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Feral Vampire
card.text: When Feral Vampire enters, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Depraved Isolationist
card.text: Menace Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, Depraved Isolationist gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Exhausted Gravekeeper
card.text: Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, surveil 2. {2}{B}, Sacrifice Exhausted Gravekeeper: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Abominable Fang Bearer
card.text: Menace, trample Scavenge {3}{B}{G} ({3}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Cruor's Monster
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on Cruor's Monster and surveil 1.

card.name: Enlightened Sanctum Keeper
card.text: When Enlightened Sanctum Keeper enters, create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Blood Grudge
card.text: Destroy target creature. Minimalist — If a nonland permanent you control was put into a graveyard this turn, create a tapped 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Crushing Avalanche
card.text: Target creature gets -12/-12 until end of turn.

card.name: Exeunt
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Scars of the Pitchfork
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -3/-3.

card.name: Trail of Blood
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. Surveil 2. You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: Refuse Oblivion
card.text: Mill three cards. You may return a permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Necrotic Fasting
card.text: When Necrotic Fasting enters, each opponent discards a card. {2}{B}, Sacrifice Necrotic Fasting: Target player loses 3 life.

card.name: Forgo Physicality
card.text: Target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a flying counter on it. It becomes a Spirit in addition to its other types." until end of turn.

card.name: Delicious Herbivore
card.text: Sacrifice Delicious Herbivore: You gain 3 life. Scavenge {3}{B} ({3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gnome Hunter
card.text: Haste Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Gnome Hunter Gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Battle Priest of Hate
card.text: {T}: Battle Priest of Hate deals 1 damage to each opponent. At the beginning of each end step, if an opponent has lost 3 or more life this turn, conjure a card name Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Pax's Flameweaver
card.text: First strike When Pax's Flameweaver enters, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Enraged Anarchist
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Enraged Anarchist deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Intimidating Lancer
card.text: When Intimidating Lancer enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Convicted —Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Intimidating Lancer gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Solun Striker
card.text: When Solun Striker attacks, another target attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Revolutionary Pyromancer
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a 3/1 Elemental creature token with haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Blood Wing Angel
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice a token: Blood Wing Angel gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Library Vandal
card.text: When Library Vandal enters, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Glyph Marked Bruiser
card.text: Trample When Glyph Marked Bruiser enters, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. Exile it as it resolves.

card.name: Prayer of Flame
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a token. Prayer of Flame deals 3 damage to any target. If this spells additional cost was paid, gain 3 life.

card.name: Fire Sword Smite
card.text: Fire Sword Smite deals 1 damage to any target. Conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Violent Evangelism
card.text: Chose one— • Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. • Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Cry of Rebellion
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Thrill of Possibility
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Righteous Anger of Solus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has menace. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Ancestral Anger
card.text: Target creature gains trample and gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Ancestral Anger in your graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Lay Seige
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Draw a card.

card.name: Fides' Fury
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Skilled Hunter
card.text: Skilled Hunter can't be blocked by creatures with flying or reach.

card.name: Infant Razortooth
card.text: Trample Scavenge abilities that target Infant Razortooth cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Crab Rider
card.text: When Crab Rider enters, create a 0/3 blue Crab creature token. {T}: Target Crab gets +3/+0 and gains vigilance until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Frenzied Cold Blood
card.text: Trample, haste Scavenge {3}{B}{G} ({3}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Preserve Rationer
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Feasting Sea Beast
card.text: Trample Tap a creature you control: Feasting Sea Beast gets +X/+X until end of turn where X is the tapped creatures power. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Branch-Bound Stalker
card.text: Vigilance, reach When Branch-Bound Stalker attacks or blocks, surveil 1.

card.name: Sea Legion Commander
card.text: Trample When Sea Legion Commander enters, create two 1/1 blue Merfolk creature tokens.

card.name: Titanic Grizzly
card.text: Trample Scavenge {7}{G}{G} ({7}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Meat Mass
card.text: Vigilance Meat Mass enters with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to the number of counters on permanents you control.

card.name: Crush of Ancient Maws
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Resurface 5 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 5 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Bloody Feast
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gets +2/+2 and gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Call of the Collective
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+X and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of tapped creatures you control.

card.name: Pick Apart
card.text: Surveil 3. You may reveal the top card of your library. If its a creature or land card, you may put it into your hand. Resurface 2 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 2 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Reckless Hunger
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample and haste.

card.name: Swallow
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent if it's an artifact, enchantment, or has flying. Otherwise return it to its controllers hand.

card.name: Aquterra's Expansion
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Resurface 2 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 2 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Return to Nature
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Cadaver-Hungry Hydra
card.text: When you cast this spell, mill three times X cards. Trample, haste Cadaver-Hungry Hydra's power and toughness are each equal to the number of other creature cards in your graveyard plus the number of cards with scavenge you own in exile. Scavenge {2}{G}{G}{G}

card.name: Depraved Faster
card.text: Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, you lose 1 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Molder of Waves
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever you cast an instant, sorcery, Merfolk, Leviathan, Shark, or Fish spell, create a 1/1 blue Merfolk creature token and put a +1/+1 counter on Molder of Waves.

card.name: Leviathan Trench
card.text: {X}, Exile a creature card with mana value X from your graveyard: Search your library for a creature with mana value X and put it onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Tyrant of Glaciers
card.text: Flying Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Tyrant of Glaciers deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Angelic Tactician
card.text: Flying Whenever Angelic Tactician attacks, up to one target token gets +3/+3 and gains flying until end of turn. {3}{W}: Conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Solus, of Holy Conquest
card.text: Prove Worthy — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control four or more Soldiers, you may have Solus become a God creature in addition to its other types. Flying, lifelink If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus that many 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens are created instead.

card.name: Fides, of Immutable Certainty
card.text: Prove Worthy — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have cast two or more spells this turn, you may have Fides become a God creature in addition to its other types. Trample, haste Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Cruor, of Endless Bloodfeast
card.text: Prove Worthy — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, you may have Cruor become a God creature in addition to its other types. Menace, trample Creature cards in your graveyard have scavenge {1}{B}{G}.

card.name: Ieiun, of Endless Fasting
card.text: Prove Worthy — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if a nonland permanent card was put into graveyard from anywhere this turn, you may have Ieiun become a God creature in addition to its other types. Deathtouch At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice another nontoken creature you control. If you do, create a token copy of it except its a 1/1 Spirit with flying.

card.name: Fluctus, of Tide and Storm
card.text: Prove Worthy — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have seven or more cards in your graveyard, you may have Fluctus become a God creature in addition to its other types. Spells can't be countered. Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have resurface 3. (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 3 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Fides' Faithful
card.text: You can't take extra turns. When Fides' Faithful enters, exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a copy of as card exiled with Fides' Faithful. (You still pay the costs.)

card.name: Me, Divine Aspirant
card.text: Haste Whenever Me attacks, choose one that hasn't been chosen. If you can't, exile Me and return it to the battlefield transformed. • Me gains menace until end of turn. • Me gains first strike until end of turn. • Me gets +1/+1 until end of turn. --- (Back): The Placebo God

card.name: The Placebo God
card.text: Whenever an opponent loses life for the first time each turn, put a loyalty counter on The Placebo God [0]: The Placebo God deals 2 damage to any target. [-X]: Exile the top X cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may cast red spells from among the exiled cards. --- (Front): Me, Divine Aspirant

card.name: Vess, Starving Refugee
card.text: When Vess, Starving Refugee enters, create a 0/1 white Human creature token. {3}, Sacrifice another Human: Transform Vess, Starving Refugee. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): The Huntswoman

card.name: The Huntswoman
card.text: Trample, ward {2} The Huntswoman can only be blocked by one creature. Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on The Huntswoman. --- (Front): Vess, Starving Refugee

card.name: Mijna, Dejected Princess
card.text: When Mijna, Dejected Princess enters, create a 1/1 blue Merfolk creature token. Whenever three or more Merfolk, Leviathan, Shark, or Fish attack, you may transform Mijna, Dejected Princess. --- (Back): Mijna, Queen of Aquterra

card.name: Mijna, Queen of Aquterra
card.text: Each other Merfolk, Leviathan, Shark, and Fish creature you control gets +1/+1. Whenever one or more Merfolk, Leviathan, Shark, or Fish attack under your control mill that many cards, then return an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. --- (Front): Mijna, Dejected Princess

card.name: Nil, Who Has it All
card.text: When Nil enters lose 1 life, create a Treasure token, and create a 0/1 white Human creature token. At the beginning of your end step, if you control no other nonland permanents, transform Nil. --- (Back): Nil, Penniless

card.name: Nil, Penniless
card.text: Ward—Pay 5 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 5 life.) At the beginning of each opponents upkeep, you draw a card and that opponent discards a card. --- (Front): Nil, Who Has it All

card.name: Pax Bellum, Pacifist
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures attack, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.") At the beginning each your end step, if two or more creatures died this turn under your control, transom Pax Bellum, Pacifist. --- (Back): Pax Bellum, The Butcher

card.name: Pax Bellum, The Butcher
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Prevent all damage that would be dealt to attacking tokens you control. --- (Front): Pax Bellum, Pacifist

card.name: Winmeari, Carnage Rebel
card.text: Attacking creatures your opponents control must attack a Winmeari planeswalker if able. [+2]: Winmeari becomes a 6/6 Angel creature with flying, lifelink, haste, and indestructible until end of turn. (She isn't a planeswalker.) [-3]: Each opponent sacrifices three creatures. [-10]: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your end step, create five 1/1 Rebel creature tokens that are all colors."

card.name: Avatar of Isolation
card.text: Lifelink Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on Avatar of Isolation. Remove five counters from Avatar of Isolation: Exile target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Return to the Material
card.text: Return each nonland permanent card in your graveyard that were put there from the battlefield this turn to the battlefield. Permanents you control gain indestructible and can't be sacrificed this turn.

card.name: Flesh Mound
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}: Flesh Mound becomes a Beast creature. (This lasts indefinitely.) Scavenge {3} ({3}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Spirit Guide
card.text: Ward {X}, where X is the number of spirits you control. Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Put a finality counter on it.

card.name: Inescapable Bloodthirst
card.text: Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Bo, Uncertainty Scribe
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play one of them this turn. Spells you cast from exile can't be countered.

card.name: Boney, Unhuntable Prey
card.text: Menace Whenever a creature enters with greater power than Boney, Unhuntable Prey, put a +1/+1 counter on Boney. If Boney would die, if it has a counter on it, remove that counter and all damage from Boney instead.

card.name: Zaharah, Who Loves
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Return target nonland permanent to the battlefield that was put into your graveyard from the battlefield this turn with a finality counter.

card.name: Zhed, Land Lover
card.text: Whenever a land enters under your control, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token. {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant you control.

card.name: Phraz, Polytheistic
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell that is exactly two colors, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.

card.name: Solun Wizards' Bane
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice Solun Wizards' Bane: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Enlightened of the Sky
card.text: Flying {T}: Target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Course Charter
card.text: When Course Charter enters, choose one — • If you control less lands than target opponent, search your library for a Plains card and put it into your hand. Shuffle afterwards. • If an opponent has more life than you, gain 4 life. • If an opponent control more creatures than you, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Mortality Clinger
card.text: Lifelink When Mortality Clinger enters, if you cast it, you may return target creature card from your graveyard that was put there from the battlefield this turn onto the battlefield.

card.name: Night Watch Protector
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Night Watch Protector attacks, you may untap another target attacking creature.

card.name: Eradicate the Sinful
card.text: Exile target creature.

card.name: Revisit the Lost
card.text: Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. It enters with finality counter on it.

card.name: Wall of Omens
card.text: Defender When Wall of Omens enters, draw a card.

card.name: Herald of Cherubs
card.text: Flying {1}, Sacrifice a token: Herald of Cherubs deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Flame Trained Soldier
card.text: Whenever you create one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on Flame Trained Soldier.

card.name: Prayer of Oblivion
card.text: Prayer of Oblivion deals 4 damage to target creature. When that creature dies this turn, conjure a card named Recruitment into you hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Tundra Sprite
card.text: Flying When Tundra Sprite enters, surveil 1.

card.name: Aquterra Bard
card.text: When Aquterra Bard enters, surveil 2. {4}{U}, Sacrifice a Aquterra Bard: Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Depth Bringer
card.text: When Depth Bringer enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. If you own it, draw a card.

card.name: Sky Tyrant
card.text: Flying Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, another target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Wave Maker
card.text: Ward {2} Wave Maker can't be blocked.

card.name: Abandon Ideology
card.text: Discard your hand. Draw three cards.

card.name: Spell Smother
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell. Draw a card.

card.name: Submerged Treasure
card.text: Draw two cards. Resurface 2 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 2 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Rabid Bloodhound
card.text: Trample, haste Scavenge abilities you activate that target Rabid Bloodhound cost {2} less to activate.

card.name: Gaping Maw of Deep Sea
card.text: Trample When Gaping Maw of Deep Sea enters, mill five cards. (Put the top five cards of your library into your graveyard.)

card.name: Consumed by the Sea
card.text: Draw a card. You may put a land card in your hand onto the battlefield. Resurface 4 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 4 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Blood Drinker
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on Blood Drinker.

card.name: Blighted Hunt
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature scavenges Blighted Hunt, it gains deathtouch and haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Scavenge {BG} ({BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: It That Feeds
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: Drainer of Viscera
card.text: Flying Whenever Drainer of Viscera enters, target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Mother of Gluttony
card.text: Trample Whenever a card is exiled from a graveyard, Mother of Gluttony gains indestructible until end of turn. Whenever Mother of Gluttony deals combat damage to an opponent, mill that many cards.

card.name: Drink the Blood
card.text: Destroy target creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Earthly Attachment
card.text: When Earthly Attachment enters, you lose 1 life and you draw a card. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Earthly Attachment: Add one mana of any color. {2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return Earthly Attachment from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Offering Gatherer
card.text: Menace, vigilance Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Offering Gatherer gets +3/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Heartbroken Necromancer
card.text: Menace When Heartbroken Necromancer attacks, if a creature died this turn under your control this turn, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token that is tapped and attacking.

card.name: Reject Flesh
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent. Destroy target nonland, nontoken permanent, then exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Battered Barbarian
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Battered Barbarian.

card.name: Divine Projector
card.text: Menace Whenever Divine Projector attacks, create a 2/1 red Avatar creature token that is tapped and attacking. Sacrifice it at the end of turn.

card.name: Soldier Devout
card.text: Whenever Soldier Devout attacks, conjure a card named Recruitment into you hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.") Sacrifice a token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Revolutionary Songwriter
card.text: Menace Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, draw a card unless an opponent has Revolutionary Songwriter deal 3 damage to them.

card.name: Fire Scaled Fidist
card.text: Flying When Fire Scaled Fidist enters, add {R}{R}{R}.

card.name: In the Flames of Glory
card.text: In the Flames of Glory deals 3 damage to any target. If you control three or more creatures, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.")

card.name: Charcoal Earth
card.text: Charcoal Earth deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Armies of Fides
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Barbarian creature tokens. Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn. Convicted — If this is the second spell you have cast this turn, create three tokens instead.

card.name: Thoughtful Survivor
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, you may draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Reckless Drake
card.text: Flying Reckless Drake's power is equal to the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard. Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Reckless Drake gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Repeat Yourself
card.text: Copy target spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Copies of permanent spells enter as tokens.)

card.name: Skull Crowned Blood Hunter
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell or scavenge a creature card, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Skull Crowned Blood Hunter.

card.name: Prophet of Salt Waters
card.text: Trample Whenever Prophet of Salt Waters is tapped to pay an additional cost of a spell, untap it.

card.name: Nippy Shoalsteer
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. As long as there are three or more counters on Nippy Shoalsteer, it has vigilance. Whenever you cast a spell or activate an ability from your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on Nippy Shoalsteer.

card.name: Frostwild Zombie
card.text: Trample Whenever Frostwild Zombie enters or is scavenged, draw a card. Scavenge {5}{G}{G} ({5}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Coral Depth Stalker
card.text: Trample Coral Depth Stalker gets +1/+1 for each other tapped creature you control.

card.name: Idol of Gore
card.text: If there are six or more creature cards that you own in your graveyard and in exile, Idol of Gore has trample, vigilance, and haste.

card.name: Ruin Excavation
card.text: Search your library for two basic land cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped. Shuffle afterwards. {G}, Discard Ruin Excavation: Mill four cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.

card.name: Strength of the Apex
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Each creature must block it this turn if able.

card.name: Coral Beast
card.text: Coral Beast can't be blocked by more than one creature. Trample Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, up to one target creature must block Coral Beast this turn if able.

card.name: Terror of Storms
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 2 life. Scavenge {4}{B}{G} ({4}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Corpse Rot
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Corpse Rot deals damage equal to the sacrificed creatures power to any target. Draw cards equal to the amount of excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Ieiun's Intervention
card.text: Choose one. If a nonland permanent you control was put into a graveyard this turn, choose two instead — • Target player discards a card. • Target player sacrifices a creature. • Target player gains 5 life.

card.name: Fides' Intervention
card.text: Choose one, if this is the second spell you have cast this turn, choose two instead. — • Draw two cards, then discard two cards. • Fides' Intervention deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. • Return target noncreature, nonland permanent to its owners hand.

card.name: Cruor's Intervention
card.text: Choose one, if you control a creature with the greatest power or tied for the greatest as you cast this spell, choose two instead. — • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. • Mill five cards. • Return target creature card from you graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Solus' Intervention
card.text: Choose one, if you controlled two or more tokens as you cast this spell, choose two instead. — • Discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. • Return a creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Fluctus' Intervention
card.text: Choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. • Create two 1/1 blue Merfolk creature tokens. • Surveil 2, then draw a card. Resurface 2 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 2 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Blood Monarch
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Whenever a creature dies, you may pay {2}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Abandoned Machine
card.text: Abandoned Machine enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Deserters Cabin
card.text: When Deserters Cabin enters or leaves the battlefield, create two 1/1 Rebel creature tokens that are all colors.

card.name: Rune of Rebuke
card.text: When Rune of Rebuke enters, draw a card. {4}, Sacrifice Rune of Rebuke: Rune of Rebuke deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Activate only as a sorcery,

card.name: Flame Scepter
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Hunters Tome
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Symbol of Rebelion.
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Create a 1/1 Rebel creature token that is all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Holy Choir
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, gain 2 life, then conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.") Tokens you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Heir's Legacy
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Resurface 3 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 3 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Sit Upon Enemy Corpses
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+0 and gains double strike until end of turn, where X is the number of spells you've cast this turn.

card.name: Ritual Warden
card.text: {2}{B}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the sacrificed permanent's mana value. Put one of those cards into your hand, then shuffle. Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, Ritual Warden gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Mana Amplifier
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana of the same type used to activate this ability. {3}, Sacrifice Mana Amplifier: Double the amount of each type of unspent mana you have.

card.name: Taran Joy, Flayer of Gods
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, put a loyalty counter on Taran Joy, Flayer of Gods. [0]: Sacrifice a creature. If you do, each opponent sacrifices a creature. [-X]: Destroy target creature, planeswalker, or enchantment with mana value X or less. [-7]: Target player loses life equal to the number of creature cards in all graveyards.

card.name: Champion of Aquterra
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever you cast a spell from your graveyard, you may return Champion of Aquterra from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Determined Chronomancer
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, if it isn't an extra turn, take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Chaotic Zealot
card.text: {3}{R}, {T}: Exile Chaotic Zealot and target creature you don't control. For each creature exiled this way, its controller reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a creature card, then puts that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of their library in a random order. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Voice of the Enlightened
card.text: When Voice of the Enlightened enters, create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on each Spirit you control.

card.name: Village Blight
card.text: Menace Sacrifice another creature: Village Blight gains indestructible until end of turn. If the sacrificed creature had scavenge you may activate that scavenge ability without paying its mana cost this turn.

card.name: Bringer of Divine Punishment
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Bringer of Divine Punishment attacks, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw cards equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Solus's Devine Crusade
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand for each creature you control. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.") Whenever you discard a spell named Recruitment, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Ice Tyrant
Escaped from the Chasm
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a creature card from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Resurface 6 (You may cast this spell from your graveyard by tapping any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 6 or greater in addition to its other costs. Then exile it.)

card.name: Kelp Assimulant
card.text: Trample, haste Kelp Assimulant can't attack or block unless a card left your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Sculpture of Flesh and Bone
card.text: When Sculpture of Flesh and Bone attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Other creatures you control get +1/+1 for each counter on Sculpture of Flesh and Bone.

card.name: Rebel Hideaway
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each color among nontoken permanents you control.

card.name: Evidence of the God Culling
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice a token: Add one mana of any color. {3}, {T}: Create a 1/1 Rebel creature token that is all colors.

card.name: Relinquish Attachments
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice X nonland permanents. Each opponent sacrifices X nonland permanents. If they sacrifice a number of permanents less than X, they lose life equal to the difference.

card.name: Armies' Echos
card.text: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, instead create twice that many of each of those tokens, except the additional tokens have haste. Sacrifice the additional tokens at the beginning of your next end step.

card.name: Mijna's Resolve
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. • You and permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Bestial Strength
card.text: When Bestial Strength enters, mill four cards. Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Feasting Vampire
card.text: Flying, lifelink Minimalist — Whenever another nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, prevent all damage that would be dealt to Feasting Vampire this turn.

card.name: Devoted Solun
card.text: Creatures you control with base power and toughness 1/1 get +1/+1.

card.name: Recurring Prey
card.text: Recurring Prey can't block You may cast Recurring Prey from exile if you scavenged it. Scavenge {2}{BG} ({2}{BG}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Nomadic Paladin
card.text: Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, reveal the top six cards of your library. You may cast an instant or sorcery card from among them with mana value less than the number of lands you control without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ship Wreck Scavenger
card.text: Ship Wreck Scavenger can't be blocked by creatures with lesser power. Whenever Ship Wreck Scavenger deals combat damage to an opponent or planeswalker, mill four cards. You may put a card milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Aquterra Tide Pusher
card.text: Trample Whenever a creature you control becomes tapped for the first time each turn, untap it. Whenever you cast a spell from your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Blood Worship Commander
card.text: Haste Whenever Blood Worship Commander attacks, conjure a card named Recruitment into your hand. (It's a sorcery that costs {1} with "Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.") Sacrifice Blood Worship Commander: Blood Worship Commander deals damage to any target equal to the number of tokens you control.

card.name: Fiery Judgement
card.text: Fiery Judgement deals 2 damage to any target. Create two 1/1 rebel creature token that are all colors.

card.name: Belief Cleaver
card.text: Menace Whenever you draw a card other than the first card you draw during your draw step, Belief Cleaver gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, you may discard a card, if you do, draw card.

card.name: Lost Among the Branches
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast as long as you control a creature with power 4 or greater. Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Camouflaged Maw
Unyielding Determination
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. Convicted — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a card exiled with Unyielding Determination into your hand.

card.name: Selfless Ascension
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. If you sacrificed a creature this way create a token copy of a creature sacrificed this way except its a 1/1 white Spirit creature with flying.

card.name: Cracking Glacier
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Cracking Glacier: Draw a card.

card.name: Angel DHW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Bird DHW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Spirit DHW
card.text: Flying

card.name: Elemental DHW
card.text: Haste

card.name: Rebel DHW
card.text: This creature is all colors

card.name: Treasure DHW
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Icecap Cemetary
card.text: Icecap Cemetary enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {4}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Towering Peaks
Glorious Road
card.text: Glorious Road enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {4}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Coral Garden
card.text: Coral Garden enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {4}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Iceroot Crags
card.text: Iceroot Crags enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {4}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Pilgrims Eye
card.text: Flying When Pilgrim's Eye enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Recruitment DHW
card.text: (Recruitment is only conjured by cards and is otherwise illegal) Create a 1/1 white Solder creature token.
